# metadata

**Instance Property**

A dictionary of additional information that was sent with the file.

## Declaration

```swift
var metadata: [String : Any]? { get }
```

## Discussion

The keys of the dictionary are strings. The values are property-list object types.

## Getting the File Information

- **fileURL**: The URL of the file that was received.

items.description: The URL of the file that was received.
items.name: fileURL
